case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO. VS SHAW PIPELINE INC.

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE INC.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,456.74 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
